summary: Completed backend + frontend regression testing for newly added auth flow and protected website-builder routes on the public preview URL. Signup/login/logout, root redirect, route guards, and authenticated project create/open flows passed.
action_items: No blocking regressions found in tested auth/protection scope.
Optional: keep this backend auth + protected-route suite in CI to prevent future guard regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Route guard and token/session architecture is consistent across frontend and backend; no critical code-level defects found in reviewed auth-related files.
Backend authorization on /api/website-builder/projects routes is correctly enforced and owner-scoped in tested flows.
seed_data_creation: Created test users and projects via API/UI with TEST_/qa_auth_ prefixes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://quick-site-builder.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Verified logged-out root redirect to /auth, signup -> /dashboard, project create -> /builder/:id, sign out from builder/dashboard, login with created credentials, and unauthorized redirects for /dashboard and /builder/:id. Backend auth endpoints and protected project CRUD validated via pytest with JUnit output.
rca of the issue: No new defect reproduced in this iteration within requested scope.
